prestazioni: Engine: VQ40DE (4.0L V6) forced induction via Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) with custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and Tomei 3-inch cat-back exhaust system featuring 409-grade stainless steel and dual 3.5-inch polished tips, paired with a Z1 Motorsports intercooler core (7.5x12x3.5 inches, bar-and-plate design) and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for precise boost control up to 12 psi on 93 octane fuel

Suspension: King Shocks 2.5-inch Remote Reservoir Coilovers (24-way adjustable compression, 12-way rebound) with 1.5-inch front and 2-inch rear lift, paired with Total Chaos Fabrication upper control arms (uniball joints, 1-inch extended ball joint spacers) and SPC adjustable rear lower control arms for corrected camber and caster under lifted geometry

Drivetrain: Nismo 4.33:1 ring and pinion gears (OEM carrier, ARP studs) with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily clutch (6-puck sprung hub, 360 ft-lb torque capacity) and a Fidanza lightweight aluminum flywheel (12.5 lbs), mated to a Synergy Manufacturing heavy-duty transmission crossmember and a Caltracs traction bar system with polyurethane bushings for axle wrap control
estetica: Body: RTR Vehicles Pro-4X-specific front bumper with integrated Baja Designs Squadron Sport LED light pods (50W, 5,000K) and a custom 3/16-inch aluminum skid plate, paired with a Decked truck bed storage system (weatherproof, modular dividers) and a Relentless Fabworks rear high-clearance bumper with integrated swing-out tire carrier (33-inch max tire, 1/4-inch steel construction)

Wheels/Tires: Method MR701 Bead Grip wheels (17x8.5, +30mm offset, 6x139.7mm lug pattern) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler all-terrain tires (285/70R17, 3-ply sidewall, 121Q load rating) with Gorilla Automotive 14mm extended wheel studs (black oxide finish) and Duraflex fender flares (pocket-style, 2-inch wider than stock, bolt-on)

Interior: Sparco Evo II racing seats (fixed-back, 6-point harness slots) with custom Procar seat mounts (adjustable fore/aft, 1-inch lower than stock), paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede grip), complemented by a Cobb Accessport V3 (pre-loaded with VQ40DE-specific off-road/towing maps) and a custom aluminum gauge pod (AEM X-Series wideband, Defi boost gauge, Innovate LC-2)
